title: UltimatePickaxe
description: Unlock the power of a leveling pickaxe! Gain XP, level up, and upgrade your tool into the ultimate mining machine. Perfect for survival and RPG servers!
body:
# UltimatePickaxe Plugin

Unlock the power of a leveling pickaxe! Gain XP, level up, and upgrade your tool into the ultimate mining machine. Perfect for survival and RPG servers!

## Commands
- `/up reload`
  - **Description:** Reload config.
  - **Permission:** `ultimatepickaxe.reload`

- `/up give <name>`
  - **Description:** Give ultimate pickaxe.
  - **Permission:** `ultimatepickaxe.give`

- `/up givexp <amount>`
  - **Description:** Give xp to the pickaxe in your hand.
  - **Permission:** `ultimatepickaxe.givexp`

## Permissions
- `ultimatepickaxe.reload`
  - **Description:** Allows to reload config.
  - **Default:** op

- `ultimatepickaxe.give`
  - **Description:** Allows to give ultimate pickaxe.
  - **Default:** op

- `ultimatepickaxe.givexp`
  - **Description:** Allows to give xp to the pickaxe in your hand.
  - **Default:** op

## Configuration
### `config.yml`
Customize the ultimate pickaxe and level rewards
